title: Aggregate MAX() function with COLLATE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name NVARCHAR(255), value INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Charlie', NULL);
SELECT MAX(value) AS max_value FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Aggregate MAX() function with COLLATE clause
